name: KCell JSC Reg.Shs (Sp.GDRs Reg.
summary: KCell JSC Reg.Shs (Sp.GDRs Reg.) represents Global Depositary Receipts of Kcell JSC, a mobile telecommunications operator in Kazakhstan. Kcell provides mobile communication services, including voice, data, and value-added services, to its customers. The company is based in Almaty, Kazakhstan.
